item.title: Why Rational People Believe Irrational Things
item.description: A look at why even thoughtful people can hold irrational beliefs.

item.title: Why does ice float?
item.description: A quick look at why ice stays on top of water and what makes it different from liquid water.

item.title: What would you say to an alien visitor?
item.description: Neil’s latest book explores alien-to-Earthling etiquette and science-based ideas for a first encounter.

item.title: Beer goggles and how perception works
item.description: A look at how perception may shape what we see, with insights from cognitive scientist Donald Hoffman on neuroscience, evolution, and consciousness.

media:content.media:title: Beer goggles and how perception works
media:content.media:description: A look at how perception may shape what we see, with insights from cognitive scientist Donald Hoffman on neuroscience, evolution, and consciousness.

item.title: What Is Consciousness?
